{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220353086CE5BEB10B32785E525A"}"},"total":956},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610595934564827929","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我是听书的书友，感觉很好，题材和大道金书很像，不刀能看，很幽默，已经二刷，为什么玄丹没有后宫？就算没有后宫，一直要当个老小孩吗？
不过，正常来说这部小说我应该给满分的，只能说我不想看平行洪荒的，只想看历史发展的。同样如果说要看历史发展的三清就必然会分家，西方必定会振奋。这是我不想看到的。总体很好三清是一家这是关键以及重要的的诙谐原因。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771982924,"group_id":"7351653302322351166","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"创作的第一本书。文笔不怎么好。就乱写写。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8OxYeyaHnv9nS5i7jy+m3vKLOI9UYO5FB7zRlWdD008","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f7ecd8d7b73046608d3f7d8285629cb5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705004&x-signature=1UBPENKhwcirCmDCF3YSN%2FGZSDI%3D","user_id":"3109041183668989","user_name":"小公喵吃不饱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3109041183668989","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1742616802,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7351653302322351166","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越洪荒，竟然成了太清炼制的九转金丹，被洪荒所有生灵觊觎！
好在，拜师太清，还觉醒了乐善好施系统。
炼制的所有丹药，效果提升十倍，赠送他人获得随机奖励，但是有随机副作用？
玄都吃丹，变成小萝莉？
羽翼仙吃丹，翅膀变大十倍，逢人就炫耀？
炼着炼着，玄丹忽然发现……
洪荒，好像变样了。
三教，不分家了？
巫妖，不大战了？
鸿钧，彻底破防了！
这还是我认识的洪荒吗？
这小子也太能搞事了吧！
不过……
好像，这样的洪荒，还不错？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/65bead5195109c8444ac5caf4398cfba","author":"笨比与猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7351653302322351166","book_name":"洪荒：仙丹批发商，副作用你不说","book_short_name":"洪荒大圣人","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#503018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7351653345548845630","read_count":"22246","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1406061"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"681","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/71fcbb4abf3e6b959ed368366be0b506~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779306788&x-signature=YPi8D9xNsH93ERXowJ7c1oE6AUY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"831697789914503","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"58"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220353086CE5BEB10B32785E525A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show
